Issue/Suggestion: Upon adding record of arrest in a case initiated, it asks several fields, one such field is "Signature of Arrested Person", since there is no option to upload the signature, it is to be examined whether the filed is necessary

Upon adding record of arrest in a case initiated, several different details are asked to be inputted in a single input box. For Example "Name, Designation, Age of Arrested Person" and "Relatives Intimated (Name/Addr/Tel)". to be examined if bifurcation is required for proper data entry and reporting
Remarks: Fixed — split into 6 separate fields: Name of Arrested Person, Designation, Age, Relative Name, Relative Address, Relative Tel. Migration applied; existing combined text preserved in primary name fields.
fixes on 8th: Applied in ArrestRegisterComponent and DGGIComponent sub-dialog. DB migration: 20260608000000_split_arrest_fields.sql

Issue/Suggestion: In the entire application wherever amount is required to be inputted, the application allows entry of alphabets as well.
Remarks: All amount/monetary fields (Detection, Recovery ITC/Cash, Demand Tax/Interest/Penalty, Amount in Crore, Expected Liability, Attachment values) now reject non-numeric input.
Further remarks iro fixes: Issue remains unfixed at various input fields in the application such as various sub menus that appear after clicking "Add Record" on the home page including entry at various registers such as arrest, SCN issued or Provisional Attachment
fixes on 8th: Fixed in sub-register inline edit cells (Arrest, SCN, Provisional Attachment) and all sub-register dialog columns — numeric fields now use regex validation and reject non-numeric input application-wide.

Issue/Suggestion: Unable to add Provisional Attachment data in the application in a NON-IR case
Remarks: Fixed — the "Related Registers" stage in the NON-IR edit form is now always accessible regardless of whether earlier stage fields are filled.
Further remarks iro fixes: issue remains unfixed, unable to add record in the Provisional attachment register from either of the "IR" and "Non IR" records
fixes on 8th: Fixed — sub-register dialogs (Arrest, Provisional Attachment, SCN) now include a "Linked Case" combobox and receive the full list of case options, enabling proper record addition from both IR and NON-IR entries.

Issue/Suggestion: When adding inputs in the provisional attachment tab, consolidated data is being asked, examine feasibility of itemised inputs seperately for each category such as immovable property, moval property, bank account, shares etc
Remarks: Already implemented — Provisional Attachment form has separate fields for Immovable, Movable, Shares/FD, Bank A/c, Third Party, Others, and Total.
Further remarks iro fixes: Discussion to be held with other stakeholders within DGGI

Issue/Suggestion: When Non-IR case is opened and you switch to the adjacent IR tab and click save, the case starts appearing in IR page at the homepage with the NON-IR number(causes confusion)   /    Alternatively, it is not intuitive how to convert the case into IR case
Remarks: Fixed — Case Type (IR/NON-IR) is now locked in edit mode and cannot be accidentally toggled. To convert NON-IR → IR, set Closure Reason = "Converted to IR".
Further remarks iro fixes: First issue is fixed, no option to close NON-IR exists in the application
fixes on 8th: Fixed — "Closure Reason" field (with options Closed / Transferred / Converted to IR) now appears in the NON-IR edit form, allowing cases to be properly closed or converted.

Issue/Suggestion: When adding a new IR, the portal requires input of Detection and Recovery amounts in "Rs." terms; the same amount is subsequently auto-populated in related registers i.e. "Arrest Register" and "Provisional Attachment" register. However, the same auto-populated amount recorded in Rupee terms therein is displayed in "Rs Crores" instead of "Rs"
Remarks: Fixed — auto-populated amounts from IR (stored in Rs.) are now correctly converted to Crores (÷ 1,00,00,000) when pre-filling Arrest Register and Provisional Attachment fields.

Issue/Suggestion: Unable to add Provisional Attachment data in the application in a NON-IR case, no error shown in website
Further remarks iro fixes: issue remains unfixed, unable to add record in the Provisional attachment register from either of the "IR" and "Non IR" records
fixes on 8th: Fixed — same as rows 5 and 14. Linked Case field and caseOptions now wired in all sub-register dialogs.

Issue/Suggestion: When adding SCN details in an IR, the webpage asks for input of "Penalty" and "Interest". To examine if these inputs are required as they are dynamic in nature
Remarks: Penalty and Interest fields currently remain as optional numeric inputs. Please clarify: should they be removed, made read-only/calculated, or remain as manual inputs?
Further remarks iro fixes: Discussion to be held with other stakeholders within DGGI

Issue/Suggestion: Date entry into various fields in the application is allowed only through graphical interface(Date Picker Dialogue). The current Date Picker Dialogue is slow moving as it does not allowing going to a specific year and month. Date entry may also be allowed through keyboard in addition to the available Date Picker
Remarks: Fixed on two fronts — (1) Calendar now has month/year dropdowns for fast navigation (2000–2040 range). (2) All date fields in dialogs now use a hybrid DateInput component that accepts keyboard typing in dd/mm/yyyy format with auto-slash insertion, plus a calendar icon for picker access.
Further remarks iro fixes: fix at serial no.2 is required at all date fields in the application, many date fields still do not allow keyboard input
fixes on 8th: Fixed — standalone register pages (Arrest Register, SCN Register, Provisional Attachment) now use the hybrid DateInput component for all date fields in their inline edit cells, enabling keyboard input throughout the application.

Issue/Suggestion: "Adjudication Formation" and "Adjudication Status" asked in the reports may be standardized with pre-dtermined options to ensure easier reporting
Remarks: Both fields now use predefined dropdowns with an "Others" fallback: - Adjudication Formation: DC/AC, JC/ADC, Commissioner, Principal Commissioner, CESTAT - Adjudication Status: Pending, OIO Issued, Dropped, Partly Confirmed, Fully Confirmed, Remanded Back, Appeal Pending, Disposed
Further remarks iro fixes: Adjudication Formation to inlcude commissionerate list, ajudication authority if required to be recorded can be recorded by way of addition of another input field. Discussion to be held with other stakeholders in DGGI

Issue/Suggestion: After inputing details of the SCN, there is no apparent option to close the case and the same remains pending as an IR entry
Remarks: Fixed — IR form now includes "Due Date / Closure Date", "Closure Reason" (Merit / Tax Payment / Transfer / Show Cause Notice), "Latest Status", and "PR/ADG Comments" fields. Setting a Closure Reason removes the case from the pending list.

Issue/Suggestion: Unable to add Provisional Attachment data in the application in a IR case
Relevant page(where the change needs to: previous issue yet to be fied(please refer row no 5 and 9 of this sheet)
Remarks: Same root cause as rows 5 and 9 — fixed.
fixes on 8th: Fixed — Linked Case combobox added to all sub-register dialogs with full caseOptions from the parent records list.

Issue/Suggestion: Entry in the registers such as "arrest register", "provisional attachment" or "SCN register" from "Investigation Cases" module unable to be deleted in case wrong entry is made, only edit option exists
Remarks: Fixed — a Delete button (with confirmation dialog) has been added to each linked record row within the Arrest Register, Provisional Attachment, and SCN Register tiles inside the Investigation Cases edit form.

Issue/Suggestion: Various records within the application within various modules such as "Investigation Cases" module including others such as "SCN register" "Alert Circular", "Provisional Attachment" can be deleted with a single click. A confirming message should pop-up where delete record option exists to avoid accidental deletion of records. If feasible, a undo pop-up or banner should also pop-up with a 5 second trigger window to allow undo accidental deletion of records(same mechanism to exist for issue at row 15
Remarks: Fixed — all delete buttons show an AlertDialog confirmation before deletion. Additionally, a 5-second undo toast is now shown after deletion — clicking Undo restores the record immediately and cancels the DB delete. Applies to all 5 registers.

Issue/Suggestion: Adding records through "SCN Register" module instead of through the "Investigation Cases" module has a few consistency issues such as (1) "Period Involved" is not auto populated, further the field name should make it onvious that the input format is YY-YY otherwise there will be input inconsistency withing the application (2) Issue option is not "auto populated", either it should auto-populate or it should give a list of options to choose from.
Remarks: Fixed — (1) Period Involved field label updated to "Period Involved (YY-YY, e.g. 23-24)" and is now auto-populated from the linked case's date of receipt when a case is selected. Noticee name, GSTIN/PAN, SIO, and Group are also auto-populated from the linked case. (2) Issue field is now a dropdown with predefined options (Classification / Valuation / ITC / Fake Invoices / Exports / Refund / Registration / Short Payment / Non-Payment / Others) with an "Others" free-text fallback. Same improvements applied to SCN entries made from within the Investigation Cases module.

Issue/Suggestion: Application allows direct addition of IR cases, discussion to be held with other stakeholders to examine if this is desired behavior. further when adding IR recrod directly the application does not capture the date of such IR
Relevant page(where the change needs to: discussion to be held with other stakeholders within DGGI
Remarks: First part (desired behavior) — pending stakeholder discussion. Second part fixed — date_of_ir is now automatically set to today when saving a new IR record if the field was left blank.
fixes on 8th: Fixed in DGGIComponent saveNew() — IR records always get date_of_ir populated on save.
